content:
These patch changes and events look really amazing. Thank you lots for adding the static background mode! It'll be much more comfortable on my eyes (and others', hopefully). Also appreciate the <:evil:1356083443020337152>  buff you know~

這些更新改動和活動看起來真的太棒了。非常感謝你們新增了靜態背景模式！這對我的眼睛（希望對其他人也是）會舒服許多。另外也很感謝你們加強了 <:evil:1356083443020337152>  你懂的
